studies.title:
Prospective, randomized, controlled,
multi-centre study on secondary prevention of
chronic ischemic
heart disease through a digital program

_verification.reason: The study specifically investigates the impact of the product Vantis | KHK und Herzinfarkt on blood pressure in patients with coronary heart disease and hypertension. The product name is explicitly mentioned multiple times in the full text, confirming the study's focus on this digital therapeutic.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a prospective, randomized, controlled, multi-centre trial, which indicates that participants were randomly allocated to intervention and control groups under controlled conditions, characteristic of an RCT.

studies.title: Prospective, Randomized, Controlled, Multicenter Study on the Treatment of Hypertension and LDL Cholesterol Using a Digital Program for Patients with Coronary Heart Disease

_verification.reason: The study specifically investigates the digital therapeutic product 'Vantis | KHK und Herzinfarkt', as it is named as the intervention in the trial description and full text.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a prospective, randomized, controlled, multicenter trial where participants are randomly assigned to an intervention group or a control group, which is characteristic of an RCT.
